patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Inter.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, initials, source, size, shape, style.
<Avatar> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'.
<Avatar> shape must be one of 'round' | 'square'.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, tone, progress, size, style.
<Badge> size must be one of 'medium' | 'large'.
<BannerAction> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: content, onAction.
<BlockStack> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: gap, align, inlineAlign, as, children, style.
<BlockStack> align must be one of 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'space-between'.
<BlockStack> inlineAlign must be one of 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'stretch'.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, variant, tone, size, icon, disclosure, fullWidth, disabled, onClick.
<ButtonGroup> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, gap, segmented, fullWidth, noWrap, style.
<Card> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: padding, background, roundedAbove, children, style.
<Card> roundedAbove must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, checked, defaultChecked, disabled, helpText, id, onChange.
<Icon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: source, tone, color, size, decorative, label, style.
<RadioButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, name, value, checked, defaultChecked, disabled, helpText, id, onChange.
<SelectOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value.
<Spinner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, tone, color, style.
<Spinner> size must be one of 'small' | 'large'.
<Spinner> tone must be one of 'base' | 'inverse'.
<Tag> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, onRemove, disabled, style.
<Text> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, as, tone, fontWeight, alignment, truncate, numeric, textDecorationLine, children, style.
<Text> alignment must be one of 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'justify'.
<Text> textDecorationLine must be one of 'line-through' | 'underline' | 'none'.
<TextField> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, defaultValue, placeholder, type, prefix, suffix, error, helpText, disabled, multiline, id, onChange.
<TextField> type must be one of 'text' | 'email' | 'number' | 'password' | 'search' | 'tel' | 'url'.
